title: Wild World
why_this_song: Wild World by Cat Stevens (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "Baby I'm grievin'"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "And it's breakin' my heart you're leavin'"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Oh baby, baby, it's a wild world"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Oh baby, baby, it's a wild world"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'll always remember you like a child, girl"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh baby, baby, it's a wild world
It's hard to get by just upon a smile
Oh baby, baby, it's a wild world
I'll always remember you like a child, girl
Oh baby, baby, it's a wild world
And I'll always remember you like a child, girl
But if you wanna leave, take good care

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: You say you wanna start something new
But if you wanna leave, take good care

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Wild World" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Wild World" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
